user.title: Connect to Fronius Gen24 Inverter
user.description: Enter the local IP address and credentials for the inverter web interface. Use the 'customer' or 'technician' account.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot reach the inverter. Check the IP address and port.

add_schedule.name: Add Schedule
add_schedule.description: Create a new time-of-use schedule and reload the integration entities.

config_entry_id.name: Config Entry ID
config_entry_id.description: Required when multiple Fronius entries are configured.

schedule_type.name: Schedule Type
schedule_type.description: Charging or discharging mode for the new schedule.

weekdays.name: Weekdays
weekdays.description: Days on which the schedule should apply.

remove_schedule.name: Remove Schedule
remove_schedule.description: Delete an existing time-of-use schedule by zero-based index and reload the integration entities.

config_entry_id.name: Config Entry ID
config_entry_id.description: Required when multiple Fronius entries are configured.

index.name: Schedule Index
index.description: Zero-based index of the schedule to remove.
